=Module <<a_api_type | module Response.Body >> =
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|module>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Body>>>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|sig>><<a_api text=".." | module Response.Body >><<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|end>>>>
----
<<pre class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code" id="TYPEt"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|type>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|t>>>><<pre id="VALempty" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|empty>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.Body.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALof_string" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|of~_string>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.Body.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALmake" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|make>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Transfer>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|encoding>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.Body.t >>>>>><<div class="odocwiki_info"|<<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|make writer>> makes a reponse body whose content is generated by
      <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|writer write>>~. <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|write str>> blocks until <<span class="odocwiki_inlinecode"|str>> is fully written~.
>>
<<pre id="VALof_cohttp" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|of~_cohttp>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_label"| encoding: >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Transfer>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|encoding>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >>\\  <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp_lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Body>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<a_api text="t" | type Response.Body.t >>>>>><<pre id="VALwrite" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|write>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.Body.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ( >>string <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| ) >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> unit <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Lwt>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|t>>>>>><<pre id="VALtransfer_encoding" class="ocsforge_color odocwiki_code"|<<span class="ocsforge_color_keyword"|val>> <<span class="odocwiki_name"|transfer~_encoding>> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"|~:>> <<span class="odocwiki_type"|<<a_api text="t" | type Response.Body.t >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| -> >> <<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Cohttp>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_uid"|Transfer>><<span class="ocsforge_color_delimiter"| . >><<span class="ocsforge_color_lid"|encoding>>>>>>
